glosses.vi: người chơi nữ; cầu thủ nữ
glosses.ja: 女子選手; 女性プレイヤー

sentences.target: Meine Schwester ist eine Spielerin im Verein.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ ɪst ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʃpiːləʁɪn ɪm fɛʁˈaɪ̯n/

translations.de: Meine Schwester ist eine Spielerin im Verein.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ ɪst ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʃpiːləʁɪn ɪm fɛʁˈaɪ̯n/
translations.en: My sister is a player at the club.
translations.es: Mi hermana juega en el club.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妹妹是俱乐部的球员。
translations.vi: Em gái tôi chơi cho câu lạc bộ.
translations.nl: Mijn zus speelt bij de club.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन क्लब में खेलती है।
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου παίζει στον σύλλογο.
translations.id: Adik perempuan saya bermain di klub.
translations.ja: 私の姉はクラブでプレーしています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Schwester'; feminine nominative singular, agrees with the head noun.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject of the copular clause.
Auxiliary 'sein' used as copula; finite, present, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate nominal.
Indefinite article; nominative feminine singular; introduces the predicate noun.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; predicate nominal complement of 'ist'.
Preposition 'in' contracted with definite article 'dem' (dative singular); introduces a dative prepositional phrase.
Common noun; masculine dative singular as object of 'im'; denotes the association/club.

sentences.target: Die Spielerin braucht heute eine Pause.

translations.de: Die Spielerin braucht heute eine Pause.
translations.en: The player needs a break today.
translations.es: La jugadora necesita un descanso hoy.
translations.fr: La joueuse a besoin de repos aujourd'hui.
translations.it: La giocatrice oggi ha bisogno di una pausa.
translations.zh-Hans: 这位球员今天需要休息。
translations.pt: A jogadora precisa de uma pausa hoje.
translations.tr: Oyuncunun bugün bir molaya ihtiyacı var.
translations.vi: Cầu thủ hôm nay cần nghỉ.
translations.nl: De speelster heeft vandaag een pauze nodig.
translations.hu: A játékosnak ma pihenőre van szüksége.
translations.hi: खिलाड़ी को आज आराम की जरूरत है।
translations.el: Η παίκτρια σήμερα χρειάζεται ένα διάλειμμα.
translations.nb: Spilleren trenger en pause i dag.
translations.id: Pemain itu hari ini butuh istirahat.
translations.sv: Spelaren behöver en paus i dag.
translations.ro: Jucătoarea are nevoie de o pauză azi.
translations.da: Spilleren har brug for en pause i dag.
translations.ja: その選手は今日休憩が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine nominative singular; determines the subject noun.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject of the sentence.
Main verb; finite, present, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb to indicate time.
Indefinite article; accusative feminine singular; introduces the direct object.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'braucht'.

sentences.target: Ich kenne die Spielerin aus der Schule.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈkɛnə diː ˈʃpiːləʁɪn aʊ̯s deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə/

translations.de: Ich kenne die Spielerin aus der Schule.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈkɛnə diː ˈʃpiːləʁɪn aʊ̯s deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə/
translations.en: I know the player from school.
translations.es: Conozco a la jugadora de la escuela.
translations.fr: Je connais la joueuse de l'école.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在学校认识那位球员。
translations.pt: Eu conheço a jogadora da escola.
translations.he: אני מכיר את השחקנית מבית הספר.
translations.vi: Tôi biết cô cầu thủ đó từ trường.
translations.nl: Ik ken de speelster van school.
translations.uk: Я знаю цю гравчиню зі школи.
translations.hi: मैं उस खिलाड़ी को स्कूल से जानता हूँ।
translations.el: Ξέρω την παίκτρια από το σχολείο.
translations.id: Saya kenal pemain itu dari sekolah.
translations.ro: O cunosc pe jucătoarea de la școală.
translations.ja: その選手は学校の知り合いです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Main verb; finite, present, 1st person singular; takes a direct object.
Definite article; feminine accusative singular; determines the object noun.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'kenne'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a source/location PP.
Definite article; feminine dative singular; part of the PP headed by 'aus'.
Common noun; feminine dative singular; object of the preposition 'aus'.

sentences.target: Die Spielerin hat sich am Knie verletzt.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈʃpiːləʁɪn hat zɪç am kniː fɛʁˈlɛtst/

translations.de: Die Spielerin hat sich am Knie verletzt.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈʃpiːləʁɪn hat zɪç am kniː fɛʁˈlɛtst/
translations.es: La jugadora se lesionó la rodilla.
translations.fr: La joueuse s'est blessée au genou.
translations.it: La giocatrice si è infortunata al ginocchio.
translations.vi: Cầu thủ đó bị chấn thương đầu gối.
translations.nl: De speelster heeft haar knie geblesseerd.
translations.hi: खिलाड़ी के घुटने में चोट लग गई।
translations.ja: その選手は膝をけがしました。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine nominative singular; determines the subject noun.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary 'haben'; finite, present, 3rd person singular; forms the perfect with the participle.
Reflexive pronoun; 3rd person; accusative; coreferential with the subject; part of the reflexive construction 'sich verletzen'.
Preposition 'an' contracted with definite article 'dem' (dative singular); introduces a dative PP indicating location/body part.
Common noun; neuter dative singular; object of the preposition 'am'.
Past participle (Partizip II) of the main verb; used with 'hat' to form perfect; in a reflexive construction with 'sich'.
